tasks.title: Paper trade validation: run live pipeline 3x and track P&L
tasks.description: Run live_runner.js (in backend/strategies/) 3 times over 30 minutes. For each run, capture trade_signals.json and record: (1) which markets were targeted, (2) what signals were generated (buy/sell, confidence, size), (3) what prices were at signal time. Save results to agents/grace/output/paper_trade_log.json. This proves the end-to-end loop works before real money. Command: cd backend/strategies && node live_runner.js

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01

# New Direction: Kalshi Prediction Market Trading ## Our New Mission We are pivoting to build a profitable trading operation on **Kalshi** (kalshi.com) — the US CFTC-regulated prediction market exchan
